docs.title: Lua Moon Phase Calculator
docs.text: This script calculates the current moon phase based on the Gregorian date. It uses Lua's built-in date and time functions.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
1. Clone the repository or download the script.
  2. Run the script using a Lua interpreter (e.g., lua main.lua).
  3. The script will display the current moon phase in the console.
